SEARCH

Class GenericLinkedList<T extends Comparable<T>>

java.lang.Object
GenericLinkedList<T>
Type Parameters:
T - The type of elements held in this list, which must be Comparable.
public class GenericLinkedList<T extends Comparable<T>> extends Object
A doubly linked list implementation specialized for hash table separate chaining. This list maintains elements in ascending order and tracks occurrences of duplicate entries.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GenericLinkedList()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    add(T element)
    Adds an element in ascending order or increments the count if it already exists.
    void
    addFirst(T data)
    Inserts a new node containing the provided data at the beginning of the list.
    void
    addLast(T data)
    Inserts a new node containing the provided data at the end of the list.
    void
    clear()
    Clears the list by nullifying the head and tail and resetting the size to zero.
    boolean
    contains(T data)
    Checks if the list contains a node with the specified data.
    void
    fillList(ArrayList<T> list)
    Adds all data elements in this list to the provided ArrayList.
    int
    getFrequency(T data)
    Retrieves the number of times a specific element has been added to the list.
    int
    getSize()
    Returns the total number of unique nodes currently in the list.
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    Determines whether the list is currently empty.
    boolean
    remove(T element)
    Removes the first node that matches the specified element from the list.
    T
    removeFirst()
    Removes and returns the data from the first node in the list.
    T
    removeLast()
    Removes and returns the data from the last node in the list.
    GenericLinkedList<T>.GenericLinkedList.Node
    search(T data)
    Public search method that returns the node associated with the provided data.

  • Constructor Details

    • GenericLinkedList

      public GenericLinkedList()

  • Method Details

    • add

      public void add(T element)
      Adds an element in ascending order or increments the count if it already exists.
      Parameters:
      element - The data element to be inserted or updated.

    • addFirst

      public void addFirst(T data)
      Inserts a new node containing the provided data at the beginning of the list.
      Parameters:
      data - The data to be added to the front of the list.

    • addLast

      public void addLast(T data)
      Inserts a new node containing the provided data at the end of the list.
      Parameters:
      data - The data to be added to the end of the list.

    • remove

      public boolean remove(T element)
      Removes the first node that matches the specified element from the list.
      Parameters:
      element - The data element to search for and remove.
      Returns:
      True if the element was successfully removed, false otherwise.

    • removeFirst

      public T removeFirst()
      Removes and returns the data from the first node in the list.
      Returns:
      The data from the removed node, or null if the list is empty.

    • getFrequency

      public int getFrequency(T data)
      Retrieves the number of times a specific element has been added to the list.
      Parameters:
      data - The element to look up.
      Returns:
      The occurrence count of the element, or 0 if not found.

    • removeLast

      public T removeLast()
      Removes and returns the data from the last node in the list.
      Returns:
      The data from the removed node, or null if the list is empty.

    • fillList

      public void fillList(ArrayList<T> list)
      Adds all data elements in this list to the provided ArrayList.
      Parameters:
      list - The target list to populate.

    • contains

      public boolean contains(T data)
      Checks if the list contains a node with the specified data.
      Parameters:
      data - The data to search for.
      Returns:
      True if the data exists in the list, false otherwise.

    • search

      public GenericLinkedList<T>.GenericLinkedList.Node search(T data)
      Public search method that returns the node associated with the provided data.
      Parameters:
      data - The data to search for.
      Returns:
      The Node containing the data, or null if no match is found.

    • getSize

      public int getSize()
      Returns the total number of unique nodes currently in the list.
      Returns:
      The size of the list.

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Determines whether the list is currently empty.
      Returns:
      True if the head is null, false otherwise.

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears the list by nullifying the head and tail and resetting the size to zero.
